annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the status and action bar at the top of the subscription detail screen and label it "Status and actions".
annotations.target_description: Status and action bar containing ACTIVE status and action buttons near the top of the subscription detail screen

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Subscription card on the left and label it "Billing dates".
annotations.target_description: Subscription card in the left column showing subscription ID, created date, start date, next payment, last payment, and total paid

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Skip & Pause card on the right and label it "Skip and pause state".
annotations.target_description: Skip & Pause card in the right column showing skip renewals and vacation mode state

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Customer Information card and label it "Customer details".
annotations.target_description: Customer Information card in the left column below the Subscription card

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Payment Gateway card and label it "Gateway connection".
annotations.target_description: Payment Gateway card in the right column near the bottom of the screenshot
annotations.notes: bottom of card is clipped by the screenshot
